name: Hubei Huitian New Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Hubei Huitian New Materials Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells adhesives and sealants in China and internationally. It offers auto lamp silicone sealants, PU sealants, epoxy adhesives, polyurethane products, MS sealants, anaerobic thread locker products, RTV silicones, glue holding parts, and structure bonding products; RTV gasket maker products, economic glues, and acrylic structural adhesives; polyurethane sealants, silicone joint sealants, polyurethane waterproof coatings, and convex block platform filled polyurethane resins; civil, curtain wall, and hollow glass adhesives; and single unit and double unit PU products. The company also provides power supplier potting products, UV-curing adhesives for vacuum cleaners, single RTV silicones, heat resistant silicones, bonding sealants, PCB cover adhesives, high performance silicones, UV adhesives, HTV single silicones, PUR adhesives, low temperature epoxy products, SMT adhesives, COB encapsulation products, LED crystal-fixing products, adhesives for said electronic panels, adhesives for naked-eye 3D displays, LED lighting products, silicone greases, LED screen potting products, LED encapsulation products, medical metal and plastic bonding products, LCD tube feet seal products, LCD sealing products, FPC IC UV protection products, glass thinning and cutting adhesives, glass panel pattern products, PET transfer print products, and double unit acrylic products. Its products are used in the industrial, automobile, electronic, high-speed rail, architecture, flexible package, water treatment, and photovoltaic sectors. The company was formerly known as Hubei Huitian Adhesive Enterprise Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Hubei Huitian New Materials Co., Ltd. in April 2014. Hubei Huitian New Materials Co., Ltd. was founded in 1977 and is based in Shanghai, China.
